subject: [CONTRIB] Use proper image for netbox provision job
commit_message:
[CONTRIB] Use proper image for netbox provision job

netbox was using readiness image to run its job. This is not the
proper usage of this image and recently it started failing because
bash is no longer available in this image.

As the script does not containt bash-specific construcitons let's
change the image to curl one and just use whatever shell is there.

Issue-ID: OOM-2406
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
Change-Id: I0cc99c6d8fe0dbe59ee982d255753d149fcdd3eb

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

thats's weird, we've got a timeout waiting for netbox-app, which is running...

I would be in favor of "redoing" the service completely because the design is bad IMHO

Patch Set 1:

this one https://github.com/bootc/netbox-chart/ is using RWO only PVC, and postgre + redis (we don't have redis in common but dcaegen2 has redis so we could "move" it to common)

I can do it if you want

Patch Set 1:

Well I submitted this as a simple fix for a simple issue that I discovered during review but if you have some idea and will to improve netbox in general don't hesitate to do it;)

Patch Set 1:

here's the list of "RWX" PVCs:
onap-cds-blueprints                                            Bound       2Gi        RWX
onap-dcaemod-genprocessor                                      Bound       4Gi        RWX
onap-netbox-static                                             Bound       100Mi      RWX

as dcaemod is a "false" positive (they said we can use RWO), we could have only one RWX (which should go away as they're working on it)
